title: iris spuria var. reichenbachiana
intro: Iris spuria var. reichenbachiana, also known as the yellow iris or Reichenbach's iris, is a subspecies of flowering plant belonging to the iris family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Iris spuria var. reichenbachiana include its ability to treat various ailments such as colds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a natural diuretic. Iris spuria var. reichenbachiana can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
